from pydantic import BaseModel


class UserRecord(BaseModel):
    name: str
    email: str
    age: int


def process_users(raw_users: list[dict]) -> list[dict]:
    results = []
    for user_dict in raw_users:
        model = UserRecord(**user_dict)
        results.append({"name": model.name, "email": model.email, "age": model.age})
    return results


def transform_batch(records: list[dict]) -> list[dict]:
    output = []
    for record in records:
        validated = UserRecord(**record)
        output.append(validated.model_dump())
    return output
